title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A YouTube roundup of major AI releases from April: Google Remy agent, Boston Dynamics Atlas upgrade, DeepSeek price cuts, Anthropic Mythos 1, Grok 5, and discussion of humanoid robots. The video frames the convergence toward AI agents capable of real work, coding, and robotics as the month's dominant trend.
